  • Classes in fr.maif used by fr.maif 
    Class Description
    FeatureCacheConfiguration
    This class allows to configure cache behaviour for izanami client.
    FeatureCacheConfiguration.Builder  
    FeatureClientErrorStrategy
    Strategy to use when one feature activation status can't be fetched or computed locally.
    FeatureClientErrorStrategy.CallbackStrategy  
    FeatureClientErrorStrategy.DefaultValueStrategy  
    FeatureClientErrorStrategy.FailStrategy  
    FeatureClientErrorStrategy.NullValueStrategy  
    IzanamiClient
    Client to query Izanami for feature activation status.
    IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder
